TRY_INJECT:test_farming_advance = {
	global_monthly_food_modifier = -0.05
	global_rice_output_modifier = 0.15
	ai_weight = { add = 10 }
}

mod_created_advance = {
	age = age_3_discovery
	icon = mod_icon
	requires = test_farming_advance
	unlock_unit = mod_unit
	global_fish_output_modifier = 0.25
}

specific_polished_stone_early = {
	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = { has_or_had_tag = TAG }
	unlock_production_method = polished_stone
}

general_polished_stone_late = {
	age = age_4_reformation
	unlock_production_method = polished_stone
}
